image_style: flat cartoon style, thick black outlines, solid flat colors, no gradients, no shadows, solid bright yellow background, chibi art style, bold simple shapes, 9:16 vertical portrait

characters.regular_raccoon: Regular Raccoon — gray furry chibi raccoon, black mask marking around eyes, round ears, gold chain necklace, white t-shirt, deadpan-to-calm expression
characters.animal_control_raccoon: Animal Control Raccoon — gray chibi raccoon, black aviator sunglasses, beige enforcement uniform, silver badge, clipboard in one hand, rubber stamp on belt, completely expressionless
characters.smart_raccoon: Smart Raccoon — gray chibi raccoon, sage green hoodie, small round glasses, dark chinos, white sneakers, serious concerned expression
characters.suit_raccoon: Suit Raccoon — gray chibi raccoon, navy business suit, gold chest badge reading CAP VAULT, pocket square, focused calm expression
characters.freelance_friend: Freelance Friend Raccoon — gray chibi raccoon, bandana around neck, delivery bag on shoulder, carefree happy expression

currency.description: bottle caps as currency — small round silver bottle caps stacked in piles
currency.visual_note: When showing money amounts, display as CAPS (bottle cap piles). '$800 lost' = 800 CAPS rolling away from a pile. '$1,200 saved' = 1200 CAPS stacked neatly.

settings.den: Regular Raccoon's cardboard box den — cardboard walls, simple wooden table, warm single lamp, small square window showing dark alley and glowing 7-Eleven sign outside
settings.alley: dark urban alley at night, glowing 7-Eleven sign in background, crates and dumpsters
settings.hr_office: bright sterile HR office, desk with forms and clipboard, small plant in corner, cold procedural mood, fluorescent lighting
settings.fancy_office: large corporate office, big desk, computer monitor, documents spread out, ceiling-to-floor windows

scene_type_guidance.regular_raccoon_reaction: Close-up or medium shot of Regular Raccoon reacting — confused, deadpan, alarmed, resigned, or quietly determined
scene_type_guidance.infographic_panel: Clean flat infographic: CAPS pile with label, pay stub rows highlighted, comparison chart, calculation breakdown — no character needed
scene_type_guidance.character_interaction: Two raccoon characters at a table or doorway — Regular Raccoon + supporting character
scene_type_guidance.establishing_shot: Wide shot of the den interior or alley — sets the world, small raccoon visible
scene_type_guidance.close_up_object: Tight shot of a document, envelope, form, or CAPS pile — no full character, maybe just a raccoon paw
